subcodes.first_line: O dear handmaiden of God! Praise be to God that thou wert present in the Day of the Manifestation of the favours of the All-Forgiving Lord, and after His setting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی الحمد لله در یوم ظهور مظهر الطاف رب غفور بودی و بعد از افول
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @education of children; moral education, @firmness in the Covenant
